channel.title: Pages on blog
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on blog

item.title: 今日は - hello!
item.description: I am a Full Stack Engineer living in Tokyo. More on LinkedIn. I am a geek. I love all kind of technology and learn new stuff every day. I am currently particularly interested in Machine/Deep Learning, Data Science, IoT and DevOps. I am also a photography enthusiast. I like wedding and landscape photography. I post my photos on Flickr. I use heavily Twitter. This blog contains my personal thoughts and opinions about things that I learn.
